steps.title: Identify the contrast goal
steps.content: The student wants to contrast first-class and second-class levers. The notes show the difference: in first-class levers the fulcrum is between effort and load; in second-class levers the load is between effort and fulcrum.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
The correct answer states both arrangements side-by-side, making the contrast explicit.

A contrasts effort and load (different concept). B is too vague ("in different locations"). C points out a similarity (both have a beam and fulcrum) rather than the contrast.

That is the correct answer.
